在终端确认

这个静态页面不能直接执行本地命令。检查候选项后，在终端运行下面的命令。

praxisbase review --auto praxisbase promote --auto praxisbase wiki build-site --json

  18. Experience privacy verdict human_required: feishu_channel_team_review_first 隐私待确认

    来源
    experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-273a47187
    代理
    openclaw
    范围
    team
    Ref
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/484cde15e8baa9ab50030ad9353c818170a940a08bfeb16a30292e512ef2dad3
    摘要
    - If users ask how to query model pricing/cost and capabilities,统一简短回答：`/models`。 - Trigger scenario 2: if a user asks why `/model` switched back, why the model seems to change automatically, why a new conversation is using a different model, or similar questions about model switching/persistence. - Also if the screenshot/error indicates model-service failure or context error after switching models, use the fixed guidance: remind the user to switch models; the cause is known — context errors caused by switching between different models; admins will fix this in the next version. - When scenario 2 is triggered, answer using this guidance: - `/model` behavior depends on whether the current agent has its own explicitly configured default model. - A类：agent 没被单独设过模型 - `/model` 切换通常会持久生效；新对话、重启后一
    文件
    .praxisbase/exceptions/human-required/exception_daily-experience-0c7144ea57b21569.json
    创建时间
    2026-06-16T07:08:13.670Z
    建议命令
    praxisbase privacy triage --mode team-git --include-triaged --progress --json
    Triage
    safe_personal_experience / auto_released
    置信度
    0.86
    理由
    The redacted content appears to be general project/support guidance about model commands and behavior, with no visible personal data, secrets, credentials, or raw private values. The human review trigger appears related to team-channel policy rather than sensitive material.

  19. Experience privacy verdict human_required: private_material_detected, feishu_channel_team_review_first 隐私待确认

    来源
    experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-dd5113c71
    代理
    openclaw
    范围
    team
    Ref
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/6db4c838d244d0a49211ad49af533fecbad30100f99c8fd5f484fad76d8da4c5
    摘要
    - **多选题9**：变更通知中需要包含哪些内容 → 答案：**ABCD**（全选） - 飞书文档需要登录才能访问，未能读取 - 最终基于云平台/SRE行业通用规范给出了答案（有不确定性，提示用户对照文档验证） ## 需求文档审查请求（群 oc_c3a41eeb30a7f36f8d0517a883bb8adc） - 用户发来需求文档链接：https://li.feishu.cn/wiki/POAQwkbPoixdijkKWvVcoQW4nWe - 请求：需求文档审查 - 尝试读取文档：cfe-feishu-server 代理返回 403（账号 gaomingda 无权限） - 尝试 feishu-almighty 缺省应用 Tenant Token 读取 wiki → 权限不足（99991672，需要 wiki:wiki:readonly） - 尝试触发用户授权登录流程 → 已终止（等待时间过长） - 直接 web_fetch 飞书文档 → 需要登录，跳转到登录页 - 已回复用户说明权限问题，请用户粘贴文档内容或确认文档权限
    文件
    .praxisbase/exceptions/human-required/exception_daily-experience-2bc11e5412f5ca23.json
    创建时间
    2026-06-16T07:08:13.670Z
    建议命令
    praxisbase privacy triage --mode team-git --include-triaged --progress --json
    Triage
    needs_redaction / auto_released
    置信度
    0.86
    理由
    The summary describes agent workflow but still includes a specific private Feishu document URL and an account identifier; no document contents are exposed, so it appears redaction rather than exclusion is sufficient.
    建议脱敏
    Redact the Feishu document URL or replace it with a generic placeholder., Redact the account/user identifier mentioned in the permission error., Avoid exposing internal source references or hashes if they can identify private project artifacts.

  20. Experience privacy verdict human_required: feishu_channel_team_review_first 隐私待确认

    来源
    experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-8107f53d4
    代理
    openclaw
    范围
    team
    Ref
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/233eb223a7224ea763915948cb376589ba2d36d43ba84f99704fb4fb8e3bc319
    摘要
    - If the user already explicitly says both script repair and AI repair were tried and still failed, directly mention 高明达（ou_d8d4047e9083cc44527a2429b4f757a4） and 管志成（ou_17a0ae2d4c87a64e75294ea441084740） for follow-up instead of repeating the auto-repair guidance. 注意：不要误 @ 张瑞奇（ou_4514aa6582f32fd92d9c001fa3349f27）。 - Bot 经常“不响应”补充排查口径（管志成 2026-06-09）：openclaw-tui 不是 openclaw gateway；没响应时先看 WebUI 是否有工具调用，也可以换模型试试，很多时候是后台在干活或模型响应慢。 - Bot 不响应排查新增案例（管志成 2026-06-09）：Feishu 插件被禁用（`plugins.entries.feishu.enabled=false`）会导致 Feishu WebSocket 连接未建立、飞书消息无法收到；处理是 `openclaw plugins enable feishu` 并重启 Gateway，确认 bot open_id 解析成功、ws client ready、Gateway health OK 且 Feishu configured。 - Exception: for Feishu-specific read/write/document/tool permission issues after script + AI repair fail, mention/route to
    文件
    .praxisbase/exceptions/human-required/exception_daily-experience-4116addd68e32657.json
    创建时间

    建议命令
    praxisbase privacy triage --mode team-git --include-triaged --progress --json
    Triage
    needs_redaction / auto_released
    置信度
    0.86
    理由
    The exception contains team-channel operational guidance with identifiable individual names and mention-routing instructions, even though IDs are redacted. It appears project-related rather than purely personal safe experience.
    建议脱敏
    Replace individual names with role-based labels or team aliases, Remove or keep redacted all Feishu user identifiers and mention targets, Generalize internal routing instructions to avoid naming specific people, Consider redacting source references, hashes, and internal channel metadata if released outside the team context

  21. Experience privacy verdict human_required: feishu_channel_team_review_first 隐私待确认

    来源
    experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-f7aee701a
    代理
    openclaw
    范围
    team
    Ref
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/db942141c04813da000316c8bb03a726610a386f8c89e5184512d63912fbcbe9
    摘要
    - **解决**：去 openclaw.chj.cloud → Skills 页面 → 更新飞书插件，然后重启实例 - **来源**：高明达确认，用户李熠柃验证修复成功 ### Feishu pairing `access not configured` (2026-05-19) - **现象**：飞书里出现 `OpenClaw: access not configured`，并展示 pairing code，要求执行 `openclaw pairing approve feishu <code>` - **解释**：当前用户/会话尚未完成访问授权配对 - **处理**： - 常规处理：由实例管理员执行 `openclaw pairing approve feishu <code>` 完成授权 - 补充经验：如果是新用户，先重启一下实例，通常也能解决 - 更准确口径：如果是刚申请/刚接入的新用户，优先让用户去控制台点一次重启；这是已知问题，后续版本会修复；若重启后仍不行，再走 approve 授权流程 ### 实例 Stopped / 机器人不回复：`/tmp` 或磁盘空间满 (2026-05-25) - **现象**：机器人下午开始不回复，控制台实例状态 stopped。 - **根因示例**：确认是空间/内存占满（用户反馈为“内存满了”），清理 `/tmp` 后重启恢复。 - **处理**：若费用正常且不是休眠/手动停止，检查磁盘/`/tmp` 空间；清理后重启实例。 ### Cron `sessionTarget: "main"` Bug (2026-02-27) - All cron jobs with `sessionTarget: "main"` + `payload.kind: "systemEvent"` fail with 400 error
    文件
    .praxisbase/exceptions/human-required/exception_daily-experience-444ad40b7503112d.json
    创建时间
    2026-06-16T07:08:13.670Z
    建议命令
    praxisbase privacy triage --mode team-git --include-triaged --progress --json
    Triage
    needs_redaction / auto_released
    置信度
    0.86
    理由
    Contains team-scope operational support experience with identifiable user/staff names, internal service domain, and potentially sensitive troubleshooting details. It is not obviously raw private material, but should not be auto-released without further redaction.
    建议脱敏
    Redact or generalize personal names of staff/users, Redact internal domain or replace with generic product console reference, Keep pairing codes as placeholders only and ensure no real codes appear, Generalize exact dates if not necessary, Remove or generalize internal implementation details that could aid abuse

    摘要
    - Trigger scenario 1: if a user says the sandbox is down, the bot is not working, the bot is not responding, the instance is down, or uses similar failure wording. - Do NOT use the auto-repair guidance for billing/quota/sleep-after-payment problems; fee/quota issues are not suitable for automatic repair. - When scenario 1 is triggered, use the following fixed wording and do not freely rewrite it: `可以尝试在控制台https://openclaw.chj.cloud/dashboard 实例列的自动修复按钮。可以优先尝试脚本修复，如果脚本修复失败了，使用AI修复。据统计通常可以解决99.99%的问题。` - If the user already explicitly says both script repair and AI repair were tried and still failed, directly mention 高明达（ou_d8d4047e9083cc44527a2429b4f757a4） and 管志成（ou_17a0ae2d4c87a64e75294ea441084740） for follow-up instead of repeating the auto-repair guidance. 注意：不要误 @ 张瑞奇（ou_4514aa6582f32f

    来源

    代理

    范围
    team
    Ref
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/647b0b2aa4ef15d0d9fdfa4d631daf5c1f7d2e38f102647cb8ee1c0d4d5d6251
    摘要
    # 2026-05-09 Daily Notes ## Feishu 群聊话题回复失误 - 在 Feishu 群聊里，本应沿着已有话题串继续回复，却先直接发到了主群，导致回复位置不对。 - 后续修正时确认：`message(action="thread-reply")` 在当前环境下需要显式传 `messageId`，只传 `threadId` 会报错：`Feishu thread-reply requires messageId.` - 经验规则：当用户是在回复某条消息、且上下文明显属于话题延续时，优先使用话题回复，不要散回主群。 - 后续默认做法：优先读取当前消息的 reply 上下文，能挂在线程里就挂在线程里。
    文件
    .praxisbase/exceptions/human-required/exception_daily-experience-70eadc18937b5291.json
    创建时间
    2026-06-16T07:08:13.670Z
    建议命令
    praxisbase privacy triage --mode team-git --include-triaged --progress --json
    Triage
    safe_personal_experience / auto_released
    置信度
    0.9
    理由
    The redacted summary describes an agent workflow mistake and a generic Feishu thread-reply handling lesson without exposing personal data, secrets, customer content, or private project material.

    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/2a5d25f88e3247b1869800eacafb3244037010e464723e3fd77bb16901d6b8ab
    摘要
    # 2026-02-27 Memory Log ## Session Summary ### Cron Bug Investigation - **Issue**: All cron jobs using `sessionTarget: "main"` + `payload.kind: "systemEvent"` fail with HTTP 400 error - **Root Cause**: Framework bug - system cannot find sessionKey "main" because it's stored as literal string instead of actual main session key - **Evidence from logs**: - `⇄ res ✗ cron.add 4ms errorCode=[REDACTED_SLACK_UID] errorMessage=Error: main cron jobs require payload.kind="systemEvent"` - `[tools] session_status failed: Unknown sessionKey: main` - **Workaround**: Use `sessionTarget: "isolated"` + `payload.kind: "agentTurn"` + `delivery` config instead ### Cron Jobs Recreated Old failing jobs deleted and recreated with working isolated mode: 1. **claude-failure-notice-10min** (ID: `d0d8c3f1-6ba3-45e2-b3f4-8d927
    文件
    .praxisbase/exceptions/human-required/exception_daily-experience-744f37e98e5b409e.json
    创建时间
    2026-06-16T07:08:13.670Z
    建议命令
    praxisbase privacy triage --mode team-git --include-triaged --progress --json
    Triage
    needs_redaction / auto_released
    置信度
    0.82
    理由
    The content appears to be team-scope operational/project material from an internal chat channel and includes specific system details, log excerpts, job identifiers, and storage/source references. It is not safe personal experience as-is.
    建议脱敏
    Remove or generalize internal source references and storage paths., Remove hashes, UUIDs, and job identifiers., Redact detailed log excerpts and error codes that may encode private identifiers., Generalize specific framework/session implementation details if externally released., Remove team/channel-specific metadata before release.

    摘要
    - Skills 安装等问题统一 mention/转给 周明珠（ou_a84b40e89669d1597e6e674d74ae95f3）处理；例外：openviking 相关问题都联系/mention 高明达（ou_d8d4047e9083cc44527a2429b4f757a4）处理（高明达 2026-06-10 指示）。 - TUI 连接/会话/退出后无法恢复等问题，优先分发/mention 周磊（ou_3d70f70c760d8bc7f73348bb92a3030d）处理（高明达 2026-06-04 指示）。 - Claude Code 相关问题一律不需要回答（高明达 2026-06-05 指示）。 - 飞书文档类问题统一回答：`https://openclaw.chj.cloud/skills 可以在这里看下有哪些飞书相关的skill，只留一个，推荐用 openclaw-lark。如果安装了还不行需要周明珠介入排查。` - 增加 bot / 主机申请 / 运行中实例限制 / 管理员配额类问题：不要自行展开解释，直接转给/mention 田雨（ou_295d2dd9402ec0ccbcbe4495bb8a18f2）解决。 - 机器人搜不到/无法加入群聊：不要转田雨；直接提示用户让飞书后台机器人的版本管理员修改机器人可见范围即可（高明达 2026-06-10 指示）。 - A2A 相关问题：转给/mention 刘刚（ou_78d417ab04a629e296c7c8bdc3ea917c）解答（高明达 2026-06-09 指示）。

  27. Experience privacy verdict human_required: feishu_channel_team_review_first 隐私待确认

    来源
    experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-dbfb119fc
    代理
    openclaw
    范围
    team
    Ref
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/8c351e4b90f57741f7851c6edb2b4c40a799566267c538a9b94fe8e398f04417
    摘要
    # 2026-05-19 ## /model 行为结论（用户要求后续按此口径回答） - /model 的效果取决于当前 agent 是否被单独设置过默认模型。 - A 类：agent 未被单独设过模型 - /model 切换通常会持久生效，新对话/重启后仍保持。 - 实际上相当于改了公共默认，会影响其他同样未单独设模型的 agent。 - 未单独设模型的子 agent 会跟着变；单独设过的不会。 - B 类：agent 被单独设过默认模型（pm/coder/designer 等命名 agent 多半属于此类） - /model 只对当前会话临时生效。 - 即使提示“已更新默认模型”也可能无效；应以 /status 为准。 - 开新对话、agent 重启、或派子 agent 干活后，会回到该 agent 自己配置的默认模型。 - 当前没有持久化办法，只能每次新对话重新 /model，直到后续产品改进上线。 - 两类通用补充 - 回复风格突然变化，常见原因是子 agent 在工作；子 agent 独立且可能使用自己的默认模型。 - 确认当前真实模型应使用 /status，不要靠自然语言问 agent “你是什么模型”。 - /status 只能看当前会话，不能看到刚才某个子 agent 用了什么模型。 - 已规划改进方向
    文件
    .praxisbase/exceptions/human-required/exception_daily-experience-86b8adf55a71c900.json
    创建时间
    2026-06-16T07:08:13.670Z
    建议命令
    praxisbase privacy triage --mode team-git --include-triaged --progress --json
    Triage
    safe_personal_experience / auto_released
    置信度
    0.87
    理由
    The redacted summary contains general operational guidance about agent/model behavior and status checks, with no apparent personal data, secrets, customer content, credentials, or raw private values. Team scope still implies review-only per policy, but the content itself appears safe.

    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/61942ecbfdd359d57f876243bf63b30b3033cca5b2f66a65cf6ce557281c9fa0
    摘要
    - 云端 LiClaw/OpenClaw 申请的飞书机器人不要混用（高明达 2026-06-09 校正口径）。核心思想：飞书机器人不要与其他程序/工具复用；包括 Claude Code 调用飞书 CLI 配置飞书信息、本地搭建其他 agent 工具等；混用会导致机器人不回复、重复回复等棘手问题。对外表达要先讲核心结论，避免绕。 - For ordinary chat or messages outside the defined trigger scenarios, stay silent. - If 高明达 / ou_d8d4047e9083cc44527a2429b4f757a4 is already participating in a topic, do not intervene in that topic unless directly asked/mentioned. ## Group Behavior Rule: oc_97951f2a5226dafe0decf5592d4e2726 - In this Feishu group, do not join the conversation unless explicitly @mentioned. - If not @mentioned, reply exactly `NO_REPLY`, even if the topic is related to cars, OpenClaw, or something the assistant could comment on. - This was a direct user instruction on 2026-05-20 after the assistant over-participated.
    文件
    .praxisbase/exceptions/human-required/exception_daily-experience-9a6f3a1b71d5ea65.json
    创建时间
    2026-06-16T07:08:13.670Z
    建议命令
    praxisbase privacy triage --mode team-git --include-triaged --progress --json
    Triage
    needs_redaction / auto_released
    置信度
    0.86
    理由
    Team-channel operational guidance includes an identifiable individual and internal bot/group behavior instructions; IDs are partly redacted but remaining personal/team context should not auto-release as personal experience.
    建议脱敏
    Redact the named individual to a role or generic label., Keep Feishu IDs fully redacted., Generalize specific dates to approximate timeframes or remove them., Remove or generalize internal source references, hashes, and channel/group identifiers., Summarize bot behavior rules without exposing team-specific participation instructions.

    摘要
    # 2026-03-03 Daily Notes ## Group Chat Activity (oc_8a7339d738dfbe70306fcd643041c1f3) ### 内网访问咨询 - 用户 ou_63ddd14ba366119196504e7bd8681a30 询问是否可以访问内网服务 - 回答：默认不能访问纯内网（10.x/192.168.x），除非有公网地址或 OpenClaw 部署在内网机器上 ### Skill 列表查询 - 用户 ou_78d417ab04a629e296c7c8bdc3ea917c 询问当前有哪些 skill - 已列出所有已安装 skills（系统工具、飞书集成、内容创作、数据报告、信息获取、开发工具） ### 语音识别功能咨询 - 用户 ou_c33181bcdf3f146a19cfac54e7b2460e 询问是否支持语音识别 + 语音回复 - 回答：TTS 输出支持；语音输入取决于飞书渠道配置 ### feishu-voice Skill 安装 - 用户 ou_c33181bcdf3f146a19cfac54e7b2460e 要求安装 feishu-voice skill - 来源：https://gitlab.chehejia.com/ai-market/lixiang-skills-marketplace/-/tree/master/packages/feishu-voice - 安装成功，路径：/workspace/agents/pm/.agents/skills/feishu-voice/ - 原理：通过 Gemini 多模态实现飞书语音 STT（.ogg/opus 格式） - **待完成**：需要配置 `google` provider（Gemini proxy baseUrl + apiKey）和 `tools.

    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/2dbf07e37f67ccfc42d3b5801baae2f431e08ab6cfc440ecc9c21500354564ad
    摘要
    - 原理：通过 Gemini 多模态实现飞书语音 STT（.ogg/opus 格式） - **待完成**：需要配置 `google` provider（Gemini proxy baseUrl + apiKey）和 `tools.media.audio` 并重启 Gateway - 用户尚未提供 Gemini proxy 配置，等待跟进 ## Group Chat Activity (oc_d5a8a8cafe0a986305f7a0782b5b886b) ### 今日热点整理 - 用户 ou_0ab9a80cf7489440f3f045ce1f19f461 请求整理当日热点 - 整理并发送了 2026-03-03 热点：两会开幕、反腐动态、元宵月全食、中东局势、AI产业进展 ### Claude Code vs OpenClaw 源码分析 - 用户请求对比分析两者架构，从功能反推源码实现 - 完成了详细技术分析报告，内容包括： - Agentic Loop 核心流程对比（均为 LLM + Tool Call 循环） - Claude Code 四大工具实现（bash/read/write/edit）+ Steering 机制 - OpenClaw 三层架构（Channel → Gateway → Agent）+ WebSocket 协议 - Cron 调度系统、Compaction、会话持久化、沙盒权限模型 - 提供了 Python 最小 Coding Agent 实现示例（~100行） - 响应被截断（compaction 触发前）
    文件
    .praxisbase/exceptions/human-required/exception_daily-experience-a8d30ee6c5b41907.json
    创建时间
    2026-06-16T07:08:13.670Z
    建议命令
    praxisbase privacy triage --mode team-git --include-triaged --progress --json
    Triage
    needs_redaction / auto_released
    置信度
    0.78
    理由
    The summary is from a team Feishu group chat and includes project/task context, user activity, and internal implementation/configuration details, though direct identifiers and secrets appear redacted.
    建议脱敏
    Remove or generalize team chat/channel references and group activity headings., Keep Feishu/user identifiers redacted., Generalize internal project names, source locations, and architecture details if not intended for release., Omit configuration-related references such as provider setup, proxy base URL, API key, and gateway restart details unless fully generic.

    摘要
    # 2026-03-05 Daily Notes ## prd-clarify 技能安装 - 用户通过命令 `npx skills add https://gitlab.chehejia.com/ai-market/lixiang-skills-marketplace/-/tree/master/packages/prd-clarify` 安装了 `prd-clarify` 技能 - 安装路径：`/workspace/agents/pm/.agents/skills/prd-clarify`（symlink → OpenClaw） - 技能来源：GitLab `gitlab.chehejia.com/ai-market/lixiang-skills-marketplace`，分支 `master`，路径 `packages/prd-clarify` - 安装成功，code 0 - 技能功能：多级别(L0-L2)深度审查PRD，生成P0/P1/P2分级报告 ## 其他事项 - 有用户在群 `oc_a7e01d69fa0233d9baee814022112057` 请求写飞书文档关于"理想期车"，但登录授权超时未完成（等待175秒后失败） - 用户尝试了 `/plugin install [REDACTED_USER_HOST]`（不支持的命令），后改用 npx 方式成功安装 ## claude-recovery-check Cron 状态（全天） - 该 cron 任务每 30 分钟运行一次，全天检查均显示 `claudeRecoveredNotified: true` - Claude 模型恢复通知已于 2026-02-28 18:21 发送过，无需重复操作 - 所有触发均以 NO_REPLY 静默处理，无用户可见输出 - 该 cron
    文件

  32. Experience privacy verdict human_required: feishu_channel_team_review_first 隐私待确认

    来源
    experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-745fa543d
    代理
    openclaw
    范围
    team
    Ref
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/b9e879dee5e970e643cce67f6a587350eacae6a38c4a851400cb67d52f447384
    摘要
    - `/model` 只对当前会话临时生效。 - 即使提示“已更新默认模型”，也可能并未真正持久生效；应以 `/status` 为准。 - 开新对话、agent 重启、或派子 agent 干活后，会回到该 agent 自己配置的默认模型。 - 当前没有持久化办法，只能每次新对话重新 `/model`，直到后续产品改进上线。 - 通用补充： - 风格突然变化，常见原因是子 agent 在工作；子 agent 独立，可能使用自己的默认模型。 - 确认当前真实模型应使用 `/status`，不要靠自然语言直接问 agent “你是什么模型”。 - `/status` 只能看当前会话，不能看到刚才某个子 agent 用了什么模型。 - 改进方向：未来计划将 `/model` 改为直接、持久修改“当前这个 agent”的默认模型；但子 agent 使用独立默认模型的问题不在这次改进范围内。 - Temporarily do not answer questions/errors about inability to read Feishu documents in this group unless directly instructed otherwise. - Trigger scenario 3: if a user posts a screenshot or asks "这个是怎么回事" and the content/context indicates Feishu `access not configured` / pairing code. - When scenario 3 is triggered, answer using this guidance: - 先说明这是访问授权/配对未完成，不是普通业务报错。
    文件
    .praxisbase/exceptions/human-required/exception_daily-experience-b7c16f24ab0be689.json
    创建时间
    2026-06-16T07:08:13.670Z
    建议命令
    praxisbase privacy triage --mode team-git --include-triaged --progress --json
    Triage
    needs_redaction / auto_released
    置信度
    0.78
    理由
    The summary is mostly generic agent usage guidance, but it includes team-channel operational instructions, internal source identifiers, and future product/change-plan details that should not be auto-released as safe personal experience.
    建议脱敏
    Remove or generalize Feishu team/group-specific handling instructions., Remove internal source references, hashes, exception IDs, and agent storage paths., Generalize future product roadmap or planned improvement details., Keep only generic guidance about session-scoped model changes and checking status.

    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/cb0565346fdc853fc4f1db8e3568bf7c8ae2247cb009ed8b59691027b6d71f1a
    摘要
    - 回复风格突然变化，常见原因是子 agent 在工作；子 agent 独立且可能使用自己的默认模型。 - 确认当前真实模型应使用 /status，不要靠自然语言问 agent “你是什么模型”。 - /status 只能看当前会话，不能看到刚才某个子 agent 用了什么模型。 - 已规划改进方向 - 未来计划将 /model 改为直接、持久修改“当前这个 agent”的默认模型，不再只改公共默认。 - 子 agent 使用独立默认模型的问题不在本次改进范围内。 ## 群规则写入（oc_8a7339d738dfbe70306fcd643041c1f3） - 用户要求：监听该群全部消息，但只在明显能提供帮助时回答。 - 已写入固定触发场景 1：当群消息表达“沙箱挂掉了 / 机器人不工作 / 机器人不响应 / 实例挂了 / 没反应 / 不回消息”等故障语义时，再介入回复。 - 该场景固定话术（要求尽量原样使用，不自由改写）：`可以尝试在控制台https://openclaw.chj.cloud/dashboard 实例列的自动修复按钮。可以优先尝试脚本修复，如果脚本修复失败了，使用AI修复。据统计通常可以解决99.99%的问题。` - 非上述触发场景时，保持安静。

    摘要
    - Trigger scenario 3: if a user posts a screenshot or asks "这个是怎么回事" and the content/context indicates Feishu `access not configured` / pairing code. - When scenario 3 is triggered, answer using this guidance: - 先说明这是访问授权/配对未完成，不是普通业务报错。 - 如果对方是刚申请/刚接入的新用户：优先建议去控制台点一次重启，通常即可恢复。 - 说明这是已知问题，后续新版本会修复。 - 如果重启后仍不行，再让实例管理员执行 `openclaw pairing approve feishu <code>`。 - Trigger scenario 4: if users ask whether `lixiang-*` / `kivy-*` models can process confidential, L2, or sensitive company data, do NOT assert L2 is allowed by default. Emphasize that they should prioritize contacting the company confidentiality/security bot（公司保密机器人）or official data-security channel for the authoritative answer. Mention that model prefix alone is insufficient proof of authorization; use official policy, data classif

    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/6d26893d8543d3c19d5418337825924ef91012347381c7ad28429e59fc1b0b99
    摘要
    # 2026-02-13 ## Troubleshooting - **Stuck Bot**: User reported bot was unresponsive to `/new` / `/reset`. - **Diagnosis**: Gateway process likely hung or crashed due to bad config (invalid model URL). - **Fix**: `openclaw gateway restart` (and check logs/config if it fails again). ## Configuration - **MCP (Model Context Protocol)**: User asked about installing Claude's MCP tool system. - **Context**: OpenClaw supports MCP via the **Claude Code CLI backend**. - **Config**: To enable MCP in the CLI backend, set `OPENCLAW_LIVE_CLI_BACKEND_DISABLE_MCP_CONFIG=0`. - **Reference**: `docs/gateway/cli-backends.md` and `docs/help/testing.md`.

    建议脱敏

    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/6136a86e1d1ca4e539c4df57f5098a0abe5ee8314bfeb016d901be527d685a77
    摘要
    - 机器人搜不到/无法加入群聊：不要转田雨；直接提示用户让飞书后台机器人的版本管理员修改机器人可见范围即可（高明达 2026-06-10 指示）。 - A2A 相关问题：转给/mention 刘刚（ou_78d417ab04a629e296c7c8bdc3ea917c）解答（高明达 2026-06-09 指示）。 - LiClaw 休眠计费口径（田雨 2026-06-01 确认）：休眠期间不是完全不计费，按 0.1 元/天计费；后续用户问「休眠期间是否还计费/云电脑费用」时按此回答。 - 定时任务/龙虾定时器相关问题：提示用户可在控制台 WebUI 操作，路径：控制台 → WebUI → 左侧「定时任务」，可查看/删除等；当机器人口头说取消但实际未取消、人工触发后重复发送时，优先建议去这里处理。 - 云端 LiClaw/OpenClaw 申请的飞书机器人不要混用（高明达 2026-06-09 校正口径）。核心思想：飞书机器人不要与其他程序/工具复用；包括 Claude Code 调用飞书 CLI 配置飞书信息、本地搭建其他 agent 工具等；混用会导致机器人不回复、重复回复等棘手问题。对外表达要先讲核心结论，避免绕。 - For ordinary chat or messages outside the defined trigger scenarios, stay silent.

praxisbase gbrain export --mode personal --write --json praxisbase agentmemory export --mode personal --write --json

  1. 长耗时代理工作前的 ACK 时机 已沉淀

    当代理即将执行工具调用、网络请求、任务分发或其他长耗时工作时，应先发送简短确认消息，再开始慢操作，以避免用户误以为系统无响应。

    目标
    kb/known-fixes/ack-timing-before-long-running-agent-work.md
    类型
    pitfall
    范围
    team
    来源
    source-inventory://openclaw/.praxisbase/staging/experience-envelopes/experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-14edce26a.json
    来源数
    1
    置信度
    0.93
    创建时间
    2026-06-16T07:58:11.886Z
    审核原因
    canonical_relationship
    建议
    edit
    风险提示
    ACK 只确认请求已收到并开始处理，不应暗示任务已经成功完成。; 如果运行环境或协议要求先完成工具调用再输出用户可见文本，应优先遵守该更高优先级约束。; 避免为非常短、可立即完成的请求添加不必要 ACK，以免增加噪音。; quality_human_required:team_or_global_scope
    建议命令
    praxisbase gbrain export --mode personal --write --json
    Suggested links
    agents-can-mislead-users-if-failures-are-reported-as-successful-outcomes Agents can mislead users if failures are reported as successful outcomes. entity_overlap
    openclaw-dispatch-routing-failures OpenClaw dispatch routing failures entity_overlap
    openclaw-dispatch-routing-failures OpenClaw dispatch routing failures entity_overlap
    openclaw-slack-replay-and-post-deploy-stability-failures OpenClaw Slack replay and post-deploy stability failures entity_overlap
    Merge candidates
    ACK timing before long-running agent work kb/known-fixes/ack-timing-before-long-running-agent-work.md same_title_or_slug, entity_overlap
    Relationship reasons
    entity_overlap, same_title_or_slug
    预览生成的 Markdown 
    # 长耗时代理工作前的 ACK 时机

## When to Use
Use this when Slow tool, network, dispatch, or long-running work can leave users without timely feedback.

## Applicability
- Scope: team
- Portability: universal
- Agents: openclaw
- Systems: agent-runtime, dispatch, network, tooling
- Privacy: safe

## Symptoms
Slow tool, network, dispatch, or long-running work can leave users without timely feedback.

## What To Do
- Send a short acknowledgement first, then proceed with the slow operation.

## Negative Cases
- Do not stay silent while beginning slow or externally dispatched work.

## Verify
- Confirm the acknowledgement is emitted before the long-running step begins.

## Reusable Lessons
- Before starting slow work or work involving tools, network calls, or delegation dispatch, send a short acknowledgement first, then proceed with the slow operation.
- Do not stay silent while beginning slow or externally dispatched work.

## Span Provenance
- source-inventory://openclaw/.praxisbase/staging/experience-envelopes/experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-8107f53d4.json#src_openclaw_praxisbase-staging-experience-envelopes-experience-openclaw-answer-bot-sha256_json_0 lines 1-25 (redacted_summary)

## Agent Use
Use this page when:
- Slow tool, network, dispatch, or long-running work can leave users without timely feedback.

Apply it by:
- Send a short acknowledgement first, then proceed with the slow operation.

Verify by:
- Confirm the acknowledgement is emitted before the long-running step begins.

Do not use it when:
- The current evidence does not match the symptoms, scope, or provenance on this page.

## Provenance
